import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 32
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut value = 0
      mut has_digits = false
      while i < n
        mut c = 32
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(x)
          c = x
        when None
          c = 32
        end
        if is_ws(c)
          i = n + 1
        else
          value = value * 10 + (c - 48)
          has_digits = true
          i = i + 1
        end
      end
      if has_digits
        let signed = value * sign
        if signed > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
      end
    end
  end
  println("positive=#{count}")
end
